tasks.label: Docker: Up
tasks.command: docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo ''; echo 'ERROR: Docker is not running. Start Docker Desktop, then try again.'; echo ''; exit 1; }; docker compose up -d && echo 'Waiting for MongoDB on :27017...' && for i in $(seq 1 30); do nc -z 127.0.0.1 27017 2>/dev/null && echo 'MongoDB is ready.' && exit 0; sleep 1; done; echo ''; echo 'ERROR: MongoDB did not become ready. Check: docker compose ps'; echo ''; exit 1
